rationale: Re-verified coherence at 77d8a1a9 under my contradiction/scope/OQ lens, with empirical spot-checks. OQ2's asymmetry stays internally consistent after the 4th fail-closed leg: R1 and OQ2 both enumerate epic-lookup/bd-list/branch-probe/ancestry as fail-CLOSED on the gate path, R3's obligation leg matches, and R2's advisory slot-naming remains the ONLY fail-open element there — message-content-only, with a falsifier forbidding pass-or-crash, so it never becomes load-bearing. The truthful-recovery split does not contradict R4 or ADR-0035: R4/AC7 pin the with-branch convergence path, the ADR-0035 touchpoint explicitly carves the branch-less final-line variant on truthfulness grounds, AC6(a) asserts the restoration prerequisite, and the branch-less case defers coherently to h4n5 across OQ3/R3/Out-of-Scope (h4n5 persisted, count==1). All 4 OQs [x] and mutually consistent. All 12 named tests absent, ScanOrphanedClosedBeads and BranchExistsE 0 code hits, AC9 greps 0/0/0/0, AC10 grep -l = the single workflow path, gitutil verified execution-owned (:4), cmd/** absent from Impacted Domains, execution self-ownership gap verified pre-existing. Scope still ~2-3 beads; the one-function BranchExistsE seam bundles with the lifecycle refactor without over-scoping.

findings.1_G2_branch_probe_fail_open: ADDRESSED — BranchExistsE speced as a new error-preserving seam beside unchanged BranchExists (gitops.go:94-100 verified, cmd.Run()==nil); R1 lists the branch probe as the 4th fail-closed leg; AC1(b) gains TestApproveImpl_BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed (absent today, RED); wrapper stays fail-open byte-identical for complete/next/doctor (orphans.go:71-83 contract verified); internal/gitutil/** added to execution Impacted Domains and In Scope, execution-owned per OWNERSHIP.yaml:4.
findings.2_G3_nondiscriminating_ACs: ADDRESSED — AC1-AC7 each chain grep -q existence discriminators with exact-named go test -run; all 12 named tests absent at 77d8a1a9; AC4 anchors on ScanOrphanedClosedBeads (0 repo-wide code hits, RED).
findings.3_G3_AC7_import_cycle: ADDRESSED — AC7 split: TestCompleteRun_RegatesAlreadyClosedOrphan package-local in internal/complete, TestApproveImpl_PassesAfterOrphanSettled in internal/approve; cycle grounding verified (no cross-imports today; complete.go:486 area is comment-only).
findings.4_G3_branchless_recovery_untruthful: ADDRESSED — R3 carries a DISTINCT branch-less recourse (restore bead/<id> ref then mindspec complete, or settle out-of-band); ADR-0035 touchpoint updated with the truthfulness rationale; AC6(a) asserts the prerequisite; complete.go:492-495 merge-base grounding verified. No contradiction with R4's convergence pin (R4/AC7 scope the with-branch path) nor with ADR-0035's final-line rule; h4n5 deferral coherent.
findings.6_G3_AC10_exactly_one: ADDRESSED — AC10 upgraded to whole-set exactly-one invariant across all .mindspec/domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml; verified grep -l returns only the workflow path (lifecycle claim at workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9).
findings.7_O3_cmd_overdeclared_and_exec_self_owne: ADDRESSED — cmd/** dropped from the spec's workflow Impacted Domains with a coherent disposition (skill text lives in internal/setup/claude.go:681/:736 embedded literal + two materialized copies, all verified; cmd/** at workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:20 is the domain's pre-existing claim, not a spec declaration); execution self-ownership gap verified real (file lists no self-path) and evidence-refuted as pre-existing, out of 115's scope.
